tEn: When Does LeJEPA Learn a World Model?
tZh: LeJEPA 何时能学习世界模型？
sEn: LeJEPA with Gaussian regularization linearly recovers latent variables from nonlinear observations, enabling optimal planning.
sZh: LeJEPA 结合高斯正则化能从非线性观测中线性恢复潜在变量，实现最优规划。
absEn: A representation that scrambles the true degrees of freedom of the world cannot support reliable planning or compositional generalization. We prove that LeJEPA (alignment plus Gaussian regularization) linearly recovers the world's latent variables from nonlinear observations, a property known as linear identifiability, in a broad class of worlds where latents evolve under stationary, additive-noise transitions. Our main result is that among all such worlds, the Gaussian is the unique latent distribution for which this guarantee holds. The forward direction rests on a spectral decomposition in which each degree of nonlinearity is strictly penalized by alignment, making the linear map the optimum; the converse rules out every non-Gaussian alternative. We further prove an approximate identifiability result where the guarantee degrades gracefully, and show that linear, orthogonal identifiability enables optimal latent-space planning. We validate the theory with experiments ranging from 2D examples to 1024-dimensional latents, including distributional ablations and pixel-based robotic control. Our theory turns an empirically successful recipe into a mathematical guarantee, providing the foundation for building World Models that provably recover the structure of the world.
absZh: 一种打乱世界真实自由度的表示无法支持可靠的规划或组合泛化。我们证明，在潜在变量遵循平稳加性噪声演化的广泛世界类别中，LeJEPA（对齐加高斯正则化）能从非线性观测中线性恢复世界的潜在变量，这一性质称为线性可识别性。我们的主要结果是：在所有此类世界中，高斯分布是唯一能保证这一性质的潜在分布。正向方向依赖于谱分解，其中每个非线性度都受到对齐的严格惩罚，使得线性映射成为最优；反向方向排除了所有非高斯替代方案。我们进一步证明了近似可识别性结果，其中保证会优雅地退化，并表明线性正交可识别性能够实现最优潜在空间规划。我们通过从二维示例到 1024 维潜在变量的实验验证了该理论，包括分布消融和基于像素的机器人控制。我们的理论将经验上成功的配方转化为数学保证，为构建能够可靠恢复世界结构的世界模型奠定了基础。

contrib.en: Proves that LeJEPA (alignment + Gaussian regularization) achieves linear identifiability for Gaussian latent worlds.
contrib.zh: 证明 LeJEPA（对齐+高斯正则化）在高斯潜在变量世界中实现线性可识别性。

contrib.en: Establishes Gaussian as the unique latent distribution guaranteeing linear identifiability under stationary additive-noise transitions.
contrib.zh: 确立高斯分布是在平稳加性噪声转移下保证线性可识别性的唯一潜在分布。

contrib.en: Derives an approximate identifiability bound that degrades gracefully with alignment and whitening errors.
contrib.zh: 推导出近似可识别性界限，该界限随对齐和白化误差优雅退化。

contrib.en: Shows linear orthogonal identifiability enables optimal latent-space planning for rotation-invariant costs.
contrib.zh: 表明线性正交可识别性使得旋转不变成本下的最优潜在空间规划成为可能。

contrib.en: Validates theory across 2D to 1024-dimensional latents, distributional ablations, and pixel-based robotic control.
contrib.zh: 在 2D 到 1024 维潜在变量、分布消融和基于像素的机器人控制中验证理论。

contrib.en: Provides the first identifiability result for Joint-Embedding Predictive Architectures (JEPAs).
contrib.zh: 为联合嵌入预测架构（JEPA）提供了首个可识别性结果。

limits.en: Assumes encoder output dimension equals true latent dimension; mismatched dimensions not analyzed.
limits.zh: 假设编码器输出维度等于真实潜在维度；未分析维度不匹配的情况。

limits.en: Population-level result; finite-sample and optimization dynamics not addressed.
limits.zh: 总体水平结果；未涉及有限样本和优化动态。

limits.en: Real-world latents may not be Gaussian; theory degrades gracefully but practical violations occur.
limits.zh: 现实世界的潜在变量可能非高斯；理论优雅退化但实际违反情况存在。

limits.en: Action-conditioned transition learning not covered; only state recovery is guaranteed.
limits.zh: 未涵盖动作条件转移学习；仅保证状态恢复。

limits.en: Requires stationary additive-noise transitions; non-stationary or multiplicative noise not considered.
limits.zh: 要求平稳加性噪声转移；未考虑非平稳或乘性噪声。

items.en: A representation that scrambles the true degrees of freedom of the world cannot support reliable planning or compositional generalization. We prove that LeJEPA (alignment plus Gaussian regularization) linearly recovers the world’s latent variables from nonlinear observations, a property known as linear identifiability, in a broad class of worlds where latents evolve under stationary, additive-noise transitions. Our main result is that among all such worlds, the Gaussian is the unique latent distribution for which this guarantee holds. The forward direction rests on a spectral decomposition in which each degree of nonlinearity is strictly penalized by alignment, making the linear map the optimum; the converse rules out every non-Gaussian alternative. We further prove an approximate identifiability result where the guarantee degrades gracefully, and show that linear, orthogonal identifiability enables optimal latent-space planning. We validate the theory with experiments ranging from 2D examples to 1024-dimensional latents, including distributional ablations and pixel-based robotic control. Our theory turns an empirically successful recipe into a mathematical guarantee, providing the foundation for building World Models that provably recover the structure of the world.
items.zh: 一种混淆世界真实自由度的表示无法支持可靠的规划或组合泛化。我们证明，在潜变量在平稳加性噪声转移下演化的一类广泛世界中，LeJEPA（对齐加高斯正则化）能从非线性观测中线性恢复世界的潜变量，这一性质称为线性可识别性。我们的主要结果是，在所有此类世界中，高斯分布是唯一能使该保证成立的潜变量分布。正向方向依赖于谱分解，其中每个非线性度都受到对齐的严格惩罚，使得线性映射成为最优；反向方向则排除了所有非高斯替代方案。我们进一步证明了一个近似可识别性结果，其中保证会优雅地退化，并表明线性正交可识别性能够实现最优潜空间规划。我们通过从二维示例到 1024 维潜变量的实验验证了该理论，包括分布消融和基于像素的机器人控制。我们的理论将一个经验上成功的配方转化为数学保证，为构建能够可靠恢复世界结构的 World Models 奠定了基础。

items.en: The promise of self-supervised learning (SSL) is that we can learn useful representations of the world without labeled data, just by observing and predicting. Joint-Embedding Predictive Architectures [JEPAs, 55] pursue this vision by training a representation to produce similar embeddings for related views of the same input, while a regularizer prevents the representation from collapsing to a trivial constant [7, 9]. The resulting representations have proven remarkably effective across image [4], video [8, 5], and latent-space planning [82, 95, 59]. However, a deeper question remains: When is a learned representation a World Model, i.e., a faithful map of the world’s latent structure?
items.zh: 自监督学习（SSL）的承诺是，我们可以在没有标注数据的情况下，仅通过观察和预测来学习有用的世界表示。联合嵌入预测架构（JEPA，[55]）通过训练表示对同一输入的相关视图产生相似嵌入来实现这一愿景，同时正则化器防止表示坍缩为平凡常数[7, 9]。由此产生的表示在图像[4]、视频[8, 5]和潜空间规划[82, 95, 59]中已被证明非常有效。然而，一个更深层次的问题仍然存在：学习到的表示何时才是 World Model，即世界潜结构的忠实映射？

items.capEn: Figure 1: LeJEPA learns the World Model. (left) The world has independent Gaussian latent variables. (center) An unknown nonlinear process scrambles them into the data we observe. (right) LeJEPA [7] recovers the latent variables up to rotation. We prove this is the unique optimum.
items.capZh: 图 1：LeJEPA 学习 World Model。（左）世界具有独立的高斯潜变量。（中）一个未知的非线性过程将它们混淆为我们观察到的数据。（右）LeJEPA [7] 恢复出潜变量（旋转等价）。我们证明这是唯一的最优解。

items.en: Our answer: When it linearly recovers the world’s latent variables (Fig. 1). A representation that entangles unrelated latent variables, scrambling an object’s position with its color, or mixing velocity with texture, may score well on narrow tasks but will fail when the world changes [75]. What we need is linear identifiability, i.e., a mathematical guarantee that the learned representation recovers the underlying latent variables, up to simple symmetries [40]. Practitioners already test for this routinely. Every time a representation is evaluated via linear probing [2], the implicit question is whether the model has learned a linear representation of the latent variables [72, 39, 80, 3, 68, 50]. Without this, linear probes cannot recover latent variables exactly. Linear identifiability is thus a necessary, albeit not sufficient [67], condition for faithful linear probing.
items.zh: 我们的答案是：当它线性恢复世界的潜变量时（图 1）。一种将不相关的潜变量纠缠在一起，混淆物体的位置与颜色，或混合速度与纹理的表示，可能在狭窄任务上表现良好，但当世界发生变化时会失败[75]。我们需要的是线性可识别性，即数学保证学习到的表示能够恢复底层潜变量，仅存在简单的对称性[40]。实践者已经常规性地对此进行测试。每次通过线性探针[2]评估表示时，隐含的问题就是模型是否学习了潜变量的线性表示[72, 39, 80, 3, 68, 50]。没有这一点，线性探针就无法精确恢复潜变量。因此，线性可识别性是忠实线性探针的必要（尽管不充分[67]）条件。

items.en: Yet no identifiability results exist for JEPAs. This has remained out of reach because prior methods rely on implicit collapse prevention [20, 34, 18] with unspecified embedding distributions. A recent shift changes the picture: LeJEPA [7] prevents collapse by explicitly regularizing the embedding distribution toward an isotropic Gaussian via Sketched Isotropic Gaussian Regularization (SIGReg). Along with an alignment loss this enables stable end-to-end training from raw pixels [59], but whether the resulting representation actually recovers the world’s latent variables still remains open.
items.zh: 然而，JEPA 尚不存在可识别性结果。这一直难以实现，因为先前的方法依赖于隐式坍缩预防[20, 34, 18]，且嵌入分布未指定。最近的一个转变改变了局面：LeJEPA [7] 通过草图各向同性高斯正则化（SIGReg）显式地将嵌入分布正则化为各向同性高斯，从而防止坍缩。结合对齐损失，这实现了从原始像素的稳定端到端训练[59]，但由此产生的表示是否真正恢复了世界的潜变量仍然悬而未决。

items.en: We close this gap with the first identifiability result for JEPAs (Fig. 2). We consider a broad class of worlds with Gaussian latent variables and positive pairs from a stationary process with independent, additive-noise transitions, which are maximum-entropy choices [45]. We prove that LeJEPA learns a linearly identifiable representation if and only if the latent variables are Gaussian. The forward direction rests on a spectral decomposition penalizing every degree of nonlinearity; the converse rules out every non-Gaussian alternative. We further prove that identifiability degrades gracefully when the objectives are only approximately satisfied, and that linear identifiability suffices for optimal latent-space planning. We validate empirically across 2D mixings, 1024-dim latents, distributional ablations, pixel-based robotic control, and the approximate bound (Sec. 6).
items.zh: 我们通过 JEPA 的第一个可识别性结果填补了这一空白（图 2）。我们考虑一类广泛的世界，具有高斯潜变量和来自平稳过程的正对，该过程具有独立的加性噪声转移，这是最大熵选择[45]。我们证明，当且仅当潜变量为高斯分布时，LeJEPA 学习到线性可识别表示。正向方向依赖于惩罚每个非线性度的谱分解；反向方向排除了所有非高斯替代方案。我们进一步证明，当目标仅近似满足时可识别性优雅地退化，并且线性可识别性足以实现最优潜空间规划。我们通过二维混合、1024 维潜变量、分布消融、基于像素的机器人控制以及近似界（第 6 节）进行了实证验证。

items.en: JEPAs [55, 4, 8, 5] predict in representation space rather than pixel space, avoiding capacity wasted on irrelevant detail. More generally, SSL pulls positive views of the same content together while preventing collapse. Contrastive methods [19, 38] use negatives explicitly [InfoNCE, 66]; non-contrastive methods substitute stop-gradient teachers [34, 20], covariance regularization [VICReg, 9, 94], or self-distillation with feature clustering [18, 77]. LeJEPA [7] adds an explicit Gaussianity regularizer (SIGReg); LeWorldModel [59] scales the recipe to action-conditioned control. InfoNCE, VICReg, and LeJEPA span a hierarchy of Gaussianity constraints, from implicit [90, 56, 26, 12] through second-moment to full; we test all three (Tab. 1, App. H.7).
items.zh: JEPA [55, 4, 8, 5] 在表示空间而非像素空间中进行预测，避免了在不相关细节上浪费容量。更一般地，SSL 将相同内容的正视图拉近，同时防止坍缩。对比方法[19, 38]显式使用负样本[InfoNCE, 66]；非对比方法使用停止梯度教师[34, 20]、协方差正则化[VICReg, 9, 94]或带特征聚类的自蒸馏[18, 77]。LeJEPA [7] 添加了显式高斯性正则化器（SIGReg）；LeWorldModel [59] 将该配方扩展到动作条件控制。InfoNCE、VICReg 和 LeJEPA 涵盖了高斯性约束的层次结构，从隐式[90, 56, 26, 12]到二阶矩再到完整；我们测试了所有三种（表 1，附录 H.7）。

items.en: The internal-model concept spans cognitive science, control theory, and modern ML. Cognitive scientists framed mental simulation as the substrate of reasoning, perception, and motor control [23, 87, 46, 93, 33], with free-energy [31] and probabilistic-program [53] formalizations of the brain as a generative model. Cybernetics extended this to engineered systems [22, 29], while classical control developed dynamics on a given state space [10, 48]. Neural world models progressed from recurrent controller-model pairs [63, 74, 85] through latent dynamics from pixels [91, 65, 28, 35, 36], value-equivalent prediction [76], generative [37] and joint-embedding predictive [55, 59] architectures, to large generative video simulators [13, 14]. The JEPA argument is that pixel-perfect prediction wastes capacity [55]. We address the encoder side of this picture; classical control applies in the learned coordinates (Thm. 5.4).
items.zh: 内部模型概念跨越认知科学、控制理论和现代机器学习。认知科学家将心理模拟视为推理、感知和运动控制的基础[23, 87, 46, 93, 33]，并将大脑形式化为自由能[31]和概率程序[53]的生成模型。控制论将其扩展到工程系统[22, 29]，而经典控制在给定状态空间上发展了动力学[10, 48]。神经世界模型从循环控制器-模型对[63, 74, 85]发展到来自像素的潜动力学[91, 65, 28, 35, 36]、值等价预测[76]、生成式[37]和联合嵌入预测[55, 59]架构，再到大型生成视频模拟器[13, 14]。JEPA 的论点是像素完美预测浪费容量[55]。我们处理了该图景的编码器侧；经典控制适用于学习到的坐标（定理 5.4）。

items.en: Nonlinear ICA is unidentifiable without additional structure [43, 57]. Identifiability becomes possible when the world supplies it: non-stationarity [41], temporal dependence [42, 51], auxiliary variables [49, 44], contrastive learning [96], augmentation [89], mechanism sparsity [52], interventions [1, 16], or supervision [69, 71]. These results typically constrain the representation to a smooth diffeomorphism; our Hermite approach works for arbitrary measurable maps. Most closely related is slow feature analysis (SFA) [92], which JEPA objectives empirically recover [81]; App. F contrasts in depth with SFA theory [83]. Similar spectral analysis in representation space has previously characterized other SSL objectives [6], and our Thm. 5.3 connects to recent quantitative stability work [17, 64]. The common lesson is that identifiability is always a joint statement about the World (‘data generating process’) and the Learner (‘learning objective’, LeJEPA).
items.zh: 非线性 ICA 在没有额外结构的情况下是不可识别的[43, 57]。当世界提供结构时，可识别性成为可能：非平稳性[41]、时间依赖性[42, 51]、辅助变量[49, 44]、对比学习[96]、增广[89]、机制稀疏性[52]、干预[1, 16]或监督[69, 71]。这些结果通常将表示约束为光滑微分同胚；我们的 Hermite 方法适用于任意可测映射。最相关的是慢特征分析（SFA）[92]，JEPA 目标经验上恢复了它[81]；附录 F 与 SFA 理论[83]进行了深入对比。表示空间中的类似谱分析先前已表征了其他 SSL 目标[6]，我们的定理 5.3 与最近的定量稳定性工作[17, 64]相关联。共同的教训是，可识别性始终是关于世界（“数据生成过程”）和学习者（“学习目标”，LeJEPA）的联合陈述。

items.en: What does it mean to Learn the World Model? Suppose the world has latent variables z∈ℝnz\in\mathbb{R}^{n}, for instance, position, velocity, color or lighting. These degrees of freedom are called latent variables / sources in the ICA literature, or factors of variation [11] in representation learning. We never observe zz directly. Instead, an unknown process gg generates the data we see: x=g​(z)x=g(z).111More philosophically, we only ever observe the shadows (x)(x) of reality (z)(z), projected (g)(g) onto the walls of Plato’s cave. Think of gg as rendering a 3D scene into an image, or mapping physical states to sensor readings. The process gg can be highly nonlinear, it scrambles the clean latent structure into complicated, entangled observations. We train a representation ff that maps observations back to representations: y=f​(x)y=f(x). The ideal outcome is that ff undoes gg: the composed map h=f∘gh=f\circ g should recover the original latent variables zz. Of course, perfect recovery is too much to hope for, there are symmetries that cannot be resolved like the rotation invariance of a Gaussian. We will show that hh must be a linear function of the true latents: h​(z)=Q​zh(z)=Qz. This is a necessary condition for linear probes to work.
items.zh: 学习 World Model 意味着什么？假设世界具有潜变量 z∈ℝⁿ，例如位置、速度、颜色或光照。这些自由度在 ICA 文献中称为潜变量/源，或在表示学习中称为变化因子[11]。我们从未直接观察到 z。相反，一个未知过程 g 生成我们看到的数据：x = g(z)。¹ 更哲学地说，我们只能观察到现实 (z) 的影子 (x)，通过 (g) 投射到柏拉图洞穴的墙壁上。将 g 视为将 3D 场景渲染为图像，或将物理状态映射到传感器读数。过程 g 可以是高度非线性的，它将清晰的潜结构混淆为复杂纠缠的观测。我们训练一个表示 f，将观测映射回表示：y = f(x)。理想的结果是 f 撤销 g：复合映射 h = f∘g 应恢复原始潜变量 z。当然，完美恢复过于奢望，存在无法解决的对称性，如高斯的旋转不变性。我们将证明 h 必须是真实潜变量的线性函数：h(z) = Qz。这是线性探针工作的必要条件。

items.en: The world specifies a joint distribution p​(z,z′)p(z,z^{\prime}) over positive pairs (g​(z),g​(z′))(g(z),g(z^{\prime})). In SSL, these are two views of the same underlying content, e.g., two frames of a video, two augmentations of an image, two nearby time steps of a trajectory. A broad class of worlds is defined by three assumptions:
items.zh: 世界指定了正对 (g(z), g(z′)) 上的联合分布 p(z, z′)。在 SSL 中，这是相同底层内容的两个视图，例如视频的两帧、图像的两个增广、轨迹的两个相邻时间步。一类广泛的世界由三个假设定义：

items.en: Independent latent variables are the standard assumption shared by ICA and disentangled representation learning [40, 11]. Stationarity means the generative process does not change between views. Additive noise is the simplest perturbation model: random fluctuations are added on top of a deterministic signal, as in sensor noise, Brownian motion, or data augmentation by jitter. Together, these assumptions define a general class of World Models. Our forward result (Sec. 5.1) will specialize this class by choosing a specific latent variable distribution (Gaussian). Our converse result (Sec. 5.2) shows that this the unique choice yielding linear identifiability in this class of worlds.
items.zh: 独立潜变量是 ICA 和 disentangled 表示学习共享的标准假设[40, 11]。平稳性意味着生成过程在视图之间不变。加性噪声是最简单的扰动模型：随机波动叠加在确定性信号之上，如传感器噪声、布朗运动或通过抖动进行数据增广。这些假设共同定义了一类通用的 World Model。我们的正向结果（第 5.1 节）将通过选择特定的潜变量分布（高斯）来特化此类。我们的反向结果（第 5.2 节）表明，在此类世界中，这是产生线性可识别性的唯一选择。

items.en: We now make a specific distributional choice within the framework above. We assume Gaussian latents, i.e., z∼𝒩​(0,In)z\sim\mathcal{N}(0,I_{n}). This is the maximum-entropy distribution for a given mean and covariance [45]; it assumes as little structure as possible. Moreover, task-relevant latents are typically aggregates of many micro-variables, which, by the central limit theorem, tend toward Gaussianity. Gaussian latents and Assumptions (3.1) entail Gaussian transitions: Stationarity requires z′∼𝒩​(0,In)z^{\prime}\sim\mathcal{N}(0,I_{n}), and the only additive-noise perturbation of a Gaussian that preserves the distribution is the Ornstein–Uhlenbeck (OU) transition [88, 25]:
items.zh: 我们现在在上述框架内做出一个具体的分布选择。我们假设高斯潜变量，即 z ∼ 𝒩(0, Iₙ)。这是在给定均值和协方差下的最大熵分布[45]；它假设尽可能少的结构。此外，任务相关的潜变量通常是许多微变量的聚合，根据中心极限定理，这些微变量趋向于高斯性。高斯潜变量和假设（3.1）蕴含高斯转移：平稳性要求 z′ ∼ 𝒩(0, Iₙ)，而保持分布的高斯的唯一加性噪声扰动是 Ornstein–Uhlenbeck（OU）转移[88, 25]：

items.en: where ρ∈(0,1)\rho\in(0,1) controls the correlation between views. One can verify: 𝔼​[z′]=0\mathbb{E}[z^{\prime}]=0, Var​(z′)=ρ2​In+(1−ρ2)​In=In\mathrm{Var}(z^{\prime})=\rho^{2}I_{n}+(1-\rho^{2})I_{n}=I_{n}, and Cov​(z,z′)=ρ​In\mathrm{Cov}(z,z^{\prime})=\rho I_{n}. The Gaussian is the unique distribution for which a channel of this form preserves the marginal, a consequence of the Gaussian being a fixed point of convolution up to rescaling. The independence assumption is satisfied because the components of zz are independent and the noise η\eta has diagonal covariance, so each (zi,zi′)(z_{i},z^{\prime}_{i}) evolves independently.
items.zh: 其中 ρ ∈ (0,1) 控制视图之间的相关性。可以验证：𝔼[z′] = 0，Var(z′) = ρ²Iₙ + (1-ρ²)Iₙ = Iₙ，且 Cov(z, z′) = ρIₙ。高斯是唯一使得这种形式的通道保持边际的分布，这是高斯是卷积不动点（缩放后）的结果。独立性假设得到满足，因为 z 的分量独立且噪声 η 具有对角协方差，因此每个 (zᵢ, z′ᵢ) 独立演化。

items.en: The representation is characterized by the composed map h=f∘g:ℝn→ℝnh=f\circ g:\mathbb{R}^{n}\to\mathbb{R}^{n} with gg the unknown generative function of the world and ff our learned representation. The two components of LeJEPA [7] training are an invariance loss pulling positive pairs together and a regularizer that shapes the embedding distribution to prevent collapse, i.e., hh (specifically, ff in h=f∘gh=f\circ g) is trained to
items.zh: 表示由复合映射 h = f∘g : ℝⁿ → ℝⁿ 刻画，其中 g 是世界的未知生成函数，f 是我们学习到的表示。LeJEPA [7] 训练的两个组成部分是拉近正对的不变性损失和塑造嵌入分布以防止坍缩的正则化器，即 h（具体地，h = f∘g 中的 f）被训练为

items.en: We model the situation where SIGReg has succeeded, i.e., h​(z)h(z) matches the target Gaussian; in practice this holds approximately (Sec. 5.3). We require nothing else about hh except measurability so expectations are defined. The result thus applies to any neural network, with output dimension taken to equal the latent dimension nn throughout (mismatched regimes m≠nm\neq n are discussed in Sec. 7). In addition, whitening (i.e., Cov​(h​(z))=In\mathrm{Cov}(h(z))=I_{n}) fixes 𝔼​[‖h​(z)‖2]=𝔼​[‖h​(z′)‖2]=n\mathbb{E}[\|h(z)\|^{2}]=\mathbb{E}[\|h(z^{\prime})\|^{2}]=n, so
items.zh: 我们模拟 SIGReg 成功的情况，即 h(z) 匹配目标高斯；在实践中这近似成立（第 5.3 节）。我们对 h 除了可测性（以便期望有定义）外没有其他要求。因此结果适用于任何神经网络，输出维度取为等于潜维度 n（不匹配情况 m ≠ n 在第 7 节讨论）。此外，白化（即 Cov(h(z)) = Iₙ）固定了 𝔼[‖h(z)‖²] = 𝔼[‖h(z′)‖²] = n，因此

items.en: Thus, minimizing distance is equivalent to maximizing correlation between the two views. The question becomes: among all measure-preserving maps hh with h​(z)∼𝒩​(0,In)h(z)\sim\mathcal{N}(0,I_{n}), which achieves the highest correlation between positive pairs h​(z),h​(z′)h(z),h(z^{\prime})?
items.zh: 因此，最小化距离等价于最大化两个视图之间的相关性。问题变为：在所有满足 h(z) ∼ 𝒩(0, Iₙ) 的保测映射 h 中，哪一个在正对 h(z), h(z′) 之间实现最高相关性？

items.en: Before proving anything, let us build intuition for the mathematical tools behind our main results.
items.zh: 在证明任何东西之前，让我们先建立对我们主要结果背后数学工具的直觉。

items.en: The world defines a transition from zz to z′z^{\prime} (3.1). This transition induces an operator on functions: given any scalar function hi​(z)h_{i}(z), define the transition operator TT by (T​hi)​(z)=𝔼​[hi​(z′)∣z](Th_{i})(z)=\mathbb{E}[h_{i}(z^{\prime})\mid z], the expected value of hih_{i} at the next view, given the current state. This is a linear operator with a spectral decomposition: a set of eigenfunctions φk\varphi_{k} satisfying T​φk=λk​φkT\varphi_{k}=\lambda_{k}\varphi_{k}, with eigenvalues 1=λ0>λ1≥λ2≥⋯≥01=\lambda_{0}>\lambda_{1}\geq\lambda_{2}\geq\cdots\geq 0. The eigenfunctions with the largest eigenvalues are most correlated across positive pairs, i.e., the most predictable features of the latent variables. This spectral perspective is the common thread behind both our forward and converse results.
items.zh: 世界定义了从 z 到 z′ 的转移（3.1）。该转移在函数上诱导了一个算子：给定任意标量函数 hᵢ(z)，定义转移算子 T 为 (Thᵢ)(z) = 𝔼[hᵢ(z′) | z]，即给定当前状态下下一个视图的 hᵢ 的期望值。这是一个线性算子，具有谱分解：一组本征函数 φₖ 满足 Tφₖ = λₖφₖ，特征值 1 = λ₀ > λ₁ ≥ λ₂ ≥ … ≥ 0。具有最大特征值的本征函数在正对之间相关性最强，即潜变量最可预测的特征。这个谱视角是我们正向和反向结果共同的主线。

items.en: For Gaussian worlds (Sec. 3.1.1), the eigenfunctions are known in closed form: they are the Hermite polynomials {Hek}k≥0\{\mathrm{He}_{k}\}_{k\geq 0}, the natural orthogonal basis for functions of Gaussian variables, analogous to Fourier modes for periodic functions. The eigenvalue of a degree-dd Hermite polynomial is exactly ρd\rho^{d}, a consequence of Mehler’s formula [61]. This means any function hi​(z)h_{i}(z) with zero mean and unit variance can be decomposed into a linear part (degree 1), a quadratic part (degree 2), a cubic part (degree 3), and so on, with variance fractions w1,w2,w3,…w_{1},w_{2},w_{3},\ldots summing to 1. The correlation across positive pairs decomposes:
items.zh: 对于高斯世界（第 3.1.1 节），本征函数已知为闭式：它们是 Hermite 多项式 {Heₖ}ₖ≥₀，高斯变量函数的自然正交基，类似于周期函数的傅里叶模式。d 次 Hermite 多项式的特征值恰好是 ρᵈ，这是 Mehler 公式[61]的结果。这意味着任何具有零均值和单位方差的函数 hᵢ(z) 可以分解为线性部分（1 次）、二次部分（2 次）、三次部分（3 次）等，方差分数 w₁, w₂, w₃, … 之和为 1。正对之间的相关性分解为：

items.en: with equality if and only if w1=1w_{1}=1, i.e., hih_{i} is linear. In words: any nonlinear distortion of the representation strictly reduces the correlation between positive pairs. This is the key intuition.
items.zh: 当且仅当 w1=1w_{1}=1，即 hih_{i} 为线性时取等。换言之：表示的任何非线性失真都会严格降低正样本对之间的相关性。这是关键直觉。

items.en: For a general latent variable distribution (not necessarily Gaussian) evolving under constant diffusion, the eigenfunctions of the transition operator are characterized by a classical Sturm–Liouville (SL) equation [83]. The first non-constant eigenfunction φ1\varphi_{1} is always monotonic, providing identifiability up to a monotonic transformation. But linear identifiability requires φ1\varphi_{1} to be affine, which places a strong constraint on the latent variable distribution. This is the engine behind our converse result (Sec. 5.2): we show that only the Gaussian satisfies this constraint. Full details in App. A.2 (Gauss/Hermite) and App. F (SL connection).
items.zh: 对于在恒定扩散下演化的一般潜变量分布（不一定是高斯分布），转移算子的特征函数由经典的 Sturm–Liouville (SL) 方程 [83] 刻画。第一个非恒定特征函数 φ1\varphi_{1} 总是单调的，从而保证了单调变换下的可辨识性。但线性可辨识性要求 φ1\varphi_{1} 是仿射的，这对潜变量分布施加了强约束。这是我们逆结果（第 5.2 节）背后的驱动力：我们证明只有高斯分布满足该约束。详见附录 A.2（Gauss/Hermite）和附录 F（SL 联系）。

items.en: We state four results that together characterize when LeJEPA learns the World Model. Thm. 5.1 shows that a Gaussian world is linearly identifiable with LeJEPA. Thm. 5.2 establishes that, within the class of worlds defined in Sec. 3.1, the Gaussian is the unique distribution with this property. Thm. 5.3 bounds the recovery error when objectives are not fully satisfied. Thm. 5.4 shows that linear identifiability enables optimal planning in latent space. All proofs have been verified in Lean 4 theorem prover modulo standard background lemmas axiomatized from the literature (App. G).
items.zh: 我们陈述四个结果，共同刻画 LeJEPA 何时学习到世界模型。定理 5.1 表明高斯世界在 LeJEPA 下是线性可辨识的。定理 5.2 确定，在第 3.1 节定义的世界类中，高斯分布是唯一具有此性质的分布。定理 5.3 给出了当目标未完全满足时的恢复误差界。定理 5.4 表明线性可辨识性使得在潜空间中进行最优规划成为可能。所有证明均在 Lean 4 定理证明器中验证，其中标准背景引理由文献公理化（附录 G）。

full.sec: 5.1 Forward Direction: LeJEPA Learns the World Model
full.secZh: 5.1 正向：LeJEPA 学习世界模型

items.en: Minimizing ℒ\mathcal{L} is equivalent to maximizing ∑i𝔼​[hi​(z′)​hi​(z)]\sum_{i}\mathbb{E}[h_{i}(z^{\prime})h_{i}(z)] (3). The spectral bound (4) gives 𝔼​[hi​(z′)​hi​(z)]≤ρ\mathbb{E}[h_{i}(z^{\prime})h_{i}(z)]\leq\rho for each component, with equality if and only if hih_{i} is linear. At equality, h​(z)=Q​zh(z)=Qz for a matrix QQ with unit-norm rows; Gaussianity forces Q​Q⊤=InQQ^{\top}=I_{n}, so QQ is orthogonal. The transition then follows by direct substitution: h​(z′)=ρ​h​(z)+1−ρ2​Q​ηh(z^{\prime})=\rho\,h(z)+\sqrt{1-\rho^{2}}\,Q\eta, and since QQ is orthogonal, Q​η∼𝒩​(0,In)Q\eta\sim\mathcal{N}(0,I_{n}) independently of h​(z)h(z). (Proof in App. A.)
items.zh: 最小化 ℒ\mathcal{L} 等价于最大化 ∑i𝔼​[hi​(z′)​hi​(z)]\sum_{i}\mathbb{E}[h_{i}(z^{\prime})h_{i}(z)] (3)。谱界 (4) 给出每个分量的 𝔼​[hi​(z′)​hi​(z)]≤ρ\mathbb{E}[h_{i}(z^{\prime})h_{i}(z)]\leq\rho，当且仅当 hih_{i} 为线性时取等。取等时，h​(z)=Q​zh(z)=Qz，其中 QQ 的行具有单位范数；高斯性迫使 Q​Q⊤=InQQ^{\top}=I_{n}，因此 QQ 是正交的。转移则通过直接代入得到：h​(z′)=ρ​h​(z)+1−ρ2​Q​ηh(z^{\prime})=\rho\,h(z)+\sqrt{1-\rho^{2}}\,Q\eta，由于 QQ 正交，Q​η∼𝒩​(0,In)Q\eta\sim\mathcal{N}(0,I_{n}) 且独立于 h​(z)h(z)。（证明见附录 A。）

items.en: The representation has no choice but to learn the full World Model. Any representation satisfying the two LeJEPA objectives must recover a rotation/reflection of the true latent variables and the true transition dynamics. The only remaining ambiguity is a global rotation, which is inherent to the isotropic Gaussian. We provide an alternative proof via Dirichlet energy and the Mazur–Ulam theorem in App. E, operating in a more theoretical (ρ→1\rho\to 1) regime.
items.zh: 表示别无选择，只能学习完整的世界模型。任何满足两个 LeJEPA 目标的表示都必须恢复真实潜变量的旋转/反射以及真实的转移动力学。唯一剩下的歧义是全局旋转，这是各向同性高斯分布固有的。我们在附录 E 中通过 Dirichlet 能量和 Mazur–Ulam 定理提供了另一种证明，该证明在更理论化的（ρ→1\rho\to 1）机制中运作。

full.sec: 5.2 Converse Direction: The Gaussian is Unique
full.secZh: 5.2 反向：高斯分布的唯一性

items.en: Thm. 5.1 uses only that h​(z)h(z) has whitened covariance (Cov​(h​(z))=In\mathrm{Cov}(h(z))=I_{n}, entailed by SIGReg, Fig. 10). Does the specific choice of Gaussian matter, or would any white distribution work? The optimal representation extracts the slowest features of the latent process [81]. Under additive noise, Sturm–Liouville theory orders these as increasingly oscillatory eigenfunctions [83]; the first is always monotonic, giving identifiability up to a monotonic transformation for any latent distribution. Linear identifiability demands this eigenfunction be affine, and only the Gaussian satisfies this.
items.zh: 定理 5.1 仅使用了 h​(z)h(z) 具有白化协方差（Cov​(h​(z))=In\mathrm{Cov}(h(z))=I_{n}，由 SIGReg 蕴含，图 10）。具体选择高斯分布是否重要，还是任何白化分布都可行？最优表示提取潜过程的最慢特征 [81]。在加性噪声下，Sturm–Liouville 理论将这些特征排序为越来越振荡的特征函数 [83]；第一个总是单调的，从而对任何潜分布保证了单调变换下的可辨识性。线性可辨识性要求该特征函数是仿射的，而只有高斯分布满足此条件。

items.en: Demanding an affine eigenfunction forces the score function (log⁡p)′(\log p)^{\prime} of the latent distribution to be linear. If φ​(zi)=a​zi+b\varphi(z_{i})=az_{i}+b is an eigenfunction, then φ′\varphi^{\prime} is constant, and the eigenvalue equation collapses to a linear ODE for (log⁡p)′(\log p)^{\prime} in ziz_{i}. Solving it yields log⁡p​(zi)∝−(zi−μ)2\log p(z_{i})\propto-(z_{i}-\mu)^{2} (the sign fixed by normalizability), which is Gaussian. The argument is per-component; independence of the latent variables lifts the conclusion to the joint distribution. (Proof in App. B.)
items.zh: 要求仿射特征函数迫使潜分布的得分函数 (log⁡p)′(\log p)^{\prime} 为线性。如果 φ​(zi)=a​zi+b\varphi(z_{i})=az_{i}+b 是一个特征函数，则 φ′\varphi^{\prime} 为常数，特征值方程退化为关于 (log⁡p)′(\log p)^{\prime} 在 ziz_{i} 上的线性 ODE。求解得到 log⁡p​(zi)∝−(zi−μ)2\log p(z_{i})\propto-(z_{i}-\mu)^{2}（符号由可归一化性固定），即为高斯分布。该论证按分量进行；潜变量的独立性将结论推广到联合分布。（证明见附录 B。）

items.en: The preceding results assume exact optimality. In practice, both objectives are only approximately satisfied: alignment reaches a value near but not equal to its minimum, and the regularizer enforces approximate whitening. Identifiability degrades gracefully in both quantities:
items.zh: 前面的结果假设精确最优性。在实践中，两个目标都只是近似满足：对齐达到接近但不等于其最小值的值，正则化器强制近似白化。可辨识性在两个量上均优雅地退化：

items.en: The bound has two pieces: a nonlinearity term DD measuring how far hh is from linear, and a distortion term (ε+D)2(\varepsilon+D)^{2} measuring how far the linear part is from orthogonal. Both vanish in the exact case (δ=ε=0\delta=\varepsilon=0), recovering Thm. 5.1. In practice the first dominates, so recovery error scales as δ/2​ρ​(1−ρ)\delta/2\rho(1-\rho): alignment is hard, whitening essentially free. (Proof in App. C.)
items.zh: 该界包含两部分：非线性项 DD 衡量 hh 与线性的偏离程度，以及失真项 (ε+D)2(\varepsilon+D)^{2} 衡量线性部分与正交的偏离程度。两者在精确情况（δ=ε=0\delta=\varepsilon=0）下消失，恢复定理 5.1。在实践中，第一项占主导，因此恢复误差按 δ/2​ρ​(1−ρ)\delta/2\rho(1-\rho) 缩放：对齐困难，白化基本免费。（证明见附录 C。）

items.en: Theorems 5.1–5.3 characterize what the encoder recovers. We now make explicit what orthogonal identifiability buys for a key motivation of World Models: planning actions in latent space.
items.zh: 定理 5.1–5.3 刻画了编码器恢复的内容。我们现在明确正交可辨识性为世界模型的一个关键动机——在潜空间中规划动作——带来了什么。

items.en: Linear identifiability turns the learned representation into a useful World Model for planning: trajectories planned in the learned latent are mathematically identical to trajectories planned in the true world, with the same actions and the same value. (Proof in App. D.)
items.zh: 线性可辨识性将学习到的表示转化为用于规划的有用世界模型：在学习到的潜空间中规划的轨迹与在真实世界中规划的轨迹在数学上相同，具有相同的动作和相同的价值。（证明见附录 D。）

items.en: We validate each result: linear identifiability on Gaussian latent variables (Sec. 6.1, Thm. 5.1); converse on a latent-distribution sweep and RL-policy [59] latents (Sec. 6.2, Thm. 5.2); approximate bound across all runs (Sec. 6.3, Thm. 5.3); and near-optimal latent planning [86] (Sec. 6.4, Thm. 5.4).
items.zh: 我们验证每个结果：高斯潜变量上的线性可辨识性（第 6.1 节，定理 5.1）；潜变量扫描和 RL 策略 [59] 潜变量上的逆结果（第 6.2 节，定理 5.2）；所有运行上的近似界（第 6.3 节，定理 5.3）；以及近最优潜规划 [86]（第 6.4 节，定理 5.4）。

full.sec: 6.1 Forward: Linear Identifiability from Gaussian Latent Variables
full.secZh: 6.1 正向：高斯潜变量的线性可辨识性

items.en: We first verify Thm. 5.1 in a controlled 2D setting. We sample latents z∼𝒩​(0,I2)z\sim\mathcal{N}(0,I_{2}) and apply four nonlinear mixing functions (Figures 1, 3): a norm-dependent rotation g​(z)=R​(π​‖z‖2)​zg(z)=R(\pi\|z\|_{2})\,z producing a spiral [c.f. 17], a sinusoidal shear g​(z1,z2)=(z1+sin⁡(1.5​z2),z2)g(z_{1},z_{2})=(z_{1}+\sin(1.5\,z_{2}),\;z_{2}), a parabolic shear g​(z1,z2)=(z1,z2+z12)g(z_{1},z_{2})=(z_{1},\;z_{2}+z_{1}^{2}), and a RealNVP-style coupling layer [24]. All four are diffeomorphisms. In addition, the spiral is measure-preserving, demonstrating that Gaussianity of the observations alone does not suffice for identifiability; alignment is essential. We train a 4-layer MLP with the LeJEPA loss ℒ=λ​ℒSIG+(1−λ)​ℒinv\mathcal{L}=\lambda\,\mathcal{L}_{\mathrm{SIG}}+(1-\lambda)\,\mathcal{L}_{\mathrm{inv}}, where positive pairs are generated via the OU transition in (1). Fig. 3 shows that the learned representation inverts each nonlinear mixing up to rotation, consistent with Thm. 5.1. A grid search over λ\lambda and ρ\rho (App. H.6) shows: too much Gaussianity (λ=0.5\lambda=0.5) collapses the representation, while the best recovery occurs at low λ\lambda and high ρ\rho.
items.zh: 我们首先在受控的 2D 设置中验证定理 5.1。我们采样潜变量 z∼𝒩​(0,I2)z\sim\mathcal{N}(0,I_{2}) 并应用四个非线性混合函数（图 1, 3）：范数依赖旋转 g​(z)=R​(π​‖z‖2)​zg(z)=R(\pi\|z\|_{2})\,z 产生螺旋 [参见 17]，正弦剪切 g​(z1,z2)=(z1+sin⁡(1.5​z2),z2)g(z_{1},z_{2})=(z_{1}+\sin(1.5\,z_{2}),\;z_{2})，抛物线剪切 g​(z1,z2)=(z1,z2+z12)g(z_{1},z_{2})=(z_{1},\;z_{2}+z_{1}^{2})，以及 RealNVP 风格的耦合层 [24]。所有四个都是微分同胚。此外，螺旋是保测度的，表明仅观测的高斯性不足以实现可辨识性；对齐是必要的。我们使用 LeJEPA 损失 ℒ=λ​ℒSIG+(1−λ)​ℒinv\mathcal{L}=\lambda\,\mathcal{L}_{\mathrm{SIG}}+(1-\lambda)\,\mathcal{L}_{\mathrm{inv}} 训练一个 4 层 MLP，其中正样本对通过 (1) 中的 OU 转移生成。图 3 显示学习到的表示将每个非线性混合逆转到旋转，与定理 5.1 一致。对 λ\lambda 和 ρ\rho 的网格搜索（附录 H.6）表明：过多的高斯性（λ=0.5\lambda=0.5）会使表示崩溃，而最佳恢复发生在低 λ\lambda 和高 ρ\rho 时。

items.capEn: Figure 3: 2D Simulations. Points colored by the polar angle and radius of the ground-truth latent variables z∼𝒩​(0,I2)z\sim\mathcal{N}(0,I_{2}) (like Fig. 1). Observations (a-c left) x=g​(z)x=g(z) after nonlinear mixing: parabolic shear, sinusoidal shear, RealNVP coupling layer [24]. Learned embeddings (a-c right): LeJEPA recovers the isotropic Gaussian structure up to rotation, consistent with Thm. 5.1.
items.capZh: 图 3：2D 模拟。点根据真实潜变量 z∼𝒩​(0,I2)z\sim\mathcal{N}(0,I_{2}) 的极角和半径着色（如图 1）。观测（a-c 左） x=g​(z)x=g(z) 经过非线性混合：抛物线剪切、正弦剪切、RealNVP 耦合层 [24]。学习到的嵌入（a-c 右）：LeJEPA 恢复各向同性高斯结构直至旋转，与定理 5.1 一致。

items.en: We next sweep the latent dimension N∈{21,…,210}N\in\{2^{1},\ldots,2^{10}\} (beyond, e.g., DINOv3’s 768768 embedding dimensions), using a RealNVP mixing and matched encoder [24] so that any failure is attributable to optimization rather than encoder expressivity. We test all three Gaussianity-enforcing classes on the same setup: SIGReg [7], VICReg [9], and InfoNCE [66]. Table 1: batch-statistic estimators (SIGReg, VICReg) maintain R2>0.999R^{2}>0.999 up to N=1024N=1024; InfoNCE degrades at scale under fixed kernel width. Thm. 5.1 is thus empirically supported across mixing functions, dimensions, and hyperparameters when the Gaussian-latent assumptions hold; the practical gap between methods appears only off the theoretical ideal.
items.zh: 接下来，我们扫描潜变量维度 N∈{21,…,210}N\in\{2^{1},\ldots,2^{10}\}（超过，例如，DINOv3 的 768768 嵌入维度），使用 RealNVP 混合和匹配编码器 [24]，以便任何失败可归因于优化而非编码器表达能力。我们在相同设置上测试所有三个高斯性强制类：SIGReg [7]、VICReg [9] 和 InfoNCE [66]。表 1：批量统计估计器（SIGReg、VICReg）在 N=1024N=1024 时保持 R2>0.999R^{2}>0.999；InfoNCE 在固定核宽度下随规模退化。因此，当高斯潜变量假设成立时，定理 5.1 在混合函数、维度和超参数上得到经验支持；方法之间的实际差距仅在理论理想之外出现。

full.sec: 6.2 Converse: Non-Gaussian Latent Variables Break Linear Identifiability
full.secZh: 6.2 反向：非高斯潜变量破坏线性可辨识性

items.en: Next, we validate Thm. 5.2’s predictions that non-Gaussian latents break linear identifiability.
items.zh: 接下来，我们验证定理 5.2 的预测：非高斯潜变量破坏线性可辨识性。

items.en: We sweep the latent variable through the generalized normal family with shape parameter α\alpha (α→0\alpha\to 0 heavy-tailed, α=1\alpha=1 Laplace, α=2\alpha=2 Gaussian, α→∞\alpha\to\infty uniform). Linear recovery peaks sharply at α=2\alpha=2 across all three objectives (Fig. 4b, App. H.7), illustrating Thm. 5.2; SIGReg and InfoNCE retain a wider plateau than VICReg for heavy-tailed latents.
items.zh: 我们通过形状参数 α\alpha（α→0\alpha\to 0 重尾，α=1\alpha=1 拉普拉斯，α=2\alpha=2 高斯，α→∞\alpha\to\infty 均匀）扫描广义正态族中的潜变量。线性恢复在 α=2\alpha=2 处对所有三个目标均达到峰值（图 4b，附录 H.7），说明了定理 5.2；SIGReg 和 InfoNCE 在重尾潜变量下比 VICReg 保持更宽的平台。

items.en: The DMC Reacher [86] has two joints, giving a 2D latent state z=(θ0,θ1)z=(\theta_{0},\theta_{1}) (Fig. 11). We train a CNN encoder with LeJEPA (App. H.11) under two conditions sharing the same rendering pipeline but different distributions: (i) OU: Gaussian samples z∼𝒩​(0,I2)z\sim\mathcal{N}(0,I_{2}) as before (1); (ii) Trajectory: joint-angle pairs (zt,zt+δ)(z_{t},z_{t+\delta}) with δ\delta frames separation from 1010k RL episodes [59]. Table 2 (left) shows that OU pairs attain R2=0.95R^{2}=0.95 at ρ=0.99\rho=0.99, with the two joint dimensions linearly recovered. In contrast, real trajectories break the Gaussian assumption (App. H.11, Figs. 12,13). Table 2 (right) shows per-dimension R2R^{2} is anisotropic, and total R2R^{2} never exceeds 0.50.5, consistent with Thm. 5.2. The trajectory condition violates several theory assumptions at once (non-Gaussian marginals, anisotropic ρ0≠ρ1\rho_{0}\neq\rho_{1}, joint-limit wrapping).
items.zh: DMC Reacher [86] 有两个关节，给出 2D 潜状态 z=(θ0,θ1)z=(\theta_{0},\theta_{1})（图 11）。我们在两种条件下使用 LeJEPA（附录 H.11）训练 CNN 编码器，共享相同的渲染管线但分布不同：（i）OU：高斯样本 z∼𝒩​(0,I2)z\sim\mathcal{N}(0,I_{2}) 如前（1）；（ii）轨迹：来自 1010k RL 情节 [59] 的关节角度对 (zt,zt+δ)(z_{t},z_{t+\delta})，δ\delta 帧间隔。表 2（左）显示 OU 对在 ρ=0.99\rho=0.99 时达到 R2=0.95R^{2}=0.95，两个关节维度线性恢复。相比之下，真实轨迹破坏了高斯假设（附录 H.11，图 12,13）。表 2（右）显示每维 R2R^{2} 是各向异性的，总 R2R^{2} 从未超过 0.50.5，与定理 5.2 一致。轨迹条件同时违反了多个理论假设（非高斯边缘、各向异性 ρ0≠ρ1\rho_{0}\neq\rho_{1}、关节极限包裹）。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Experimental Results. a) Bound Verification. SIGReg runs across grid, 2D, scaling, and gennorm α=2\alpha{=}2 lie below the diagonal, confirming Thm. 5.3. Two near-zero outliers reflect finite-sample noise. b) Gaussian Optimality. Linear recovery, R2(h→zR^{2}(h\to z), peaks at Gaussian, illustrating Thm. 5.2. SIGReg’s Gaussianization of hh is more robust to non-Gaussian latent variable distributions than whitening. (c) Control cost over K=30K=30 random start-goal pairs (path length ≥1\geq 1, ideal 11). The Gaussian encoder is statistically indistinguishable from the oracle; the Trajectory encoder is biased upward. (d) Control cost decreases with linear identifiability R2R^{2}, supporting Thm. 5.4.
items.capZh: 图 4：实验结果。a) 界验证。网格、2D、缩放和 gennorm α=2\alpha{=}2 上的 SIGReg 运行位于对角线下方，确认定理 5.3。两个接近零的异常值反映了有限样本噪声。b) 高斯最优性。线性恢复 R2(h→zR^{2}(h\to z) 在高斯处达到峰值，说明了定理 5.2。SIGReg 对 hh 的高斯化比白化对非高斯潜变量分布更鲁棒。(c) 在 K=30K=30 个随机起始-目标对上的控制代价（路径长度 ≥1\geq 1，理想 11）。高斯编码器在统计上与 oracle 不可区分；轨迹编码器有向上偏差。(d) 控制代价随线性可辨识性 R2R^{2} 降低，支持定理 5.4。

full.sec: 6.3 Approximation Bound and Loss Predict Identifiability
full.secZh: 6.3 近似界与损失预测可辨识性

items.en: Thm. 5.3 bounds the recovery error by the whitening error ε=‖Cov​(h​(z))−I‖F\varepsilon=\|\mathrm{Cov}(h(z))-I\|_{F} and the alignment gap δ=ℒ​(h)−2​(1−ρ)​tr​(Cov​(h​(z)))\delta=\mathcal{L}(h)-2(1-\rho)\,\mathrm{tr}(\mathrm{Cov}(h(z))). For each run we compute ε\varepsilon, δ\delta, the bound D+(ε+D)2D+(\varepsilon+D)^{2}, and the actual recovery error minQ∈O​(n)⁡𝔼​[‖h​(z)−Q​z‖2]\min_{Q\in O(n)}\mathbb{E}[\|h(z)-Qz\|^{2}] (Fig. 4a). The bound holds across grid search, 2D mixings, scaling, and the latent-distribution sweep, supporting Thm. 5.3 empirically. As a practical corollary, training loss is a reliable proxy for identifiability (App. H.9).
items.zh: 定理 5.3 通过白化误差 ε=‖Cov​(h​(z))−I‖F\varepsilon=\|\mathrm{Cov}(h(z))-I\|_{F} 和对齐差距 δ=ℒ​(h)−2​(1−ρ)​tr​(Cov​(h​(z)))\delta=\mathcal{L}(h)-2(1-\rho)\,\mathrm{tr}(\mathrm{Cov}(h(z))) 界定了恢复误差。对于每次运行，我们计算 ε\varepsilon、δ\delta、界 D+(ε+D)2D+(\varepsilon+D)^{2} 和实际恢复误差 minQ∈O​(n)⁡𝔼​[‖h​(z)−Q​z‖2]\min_{Q\in O(n)}\mathbb{E}[\|h(z)-Qz\|^{2}]（图 4a）。该界在网格搜索、2D 混合、缩放和潜变量分布扫描中成立，经验上支持定理 5.3。作为实际推论，训练损失是可辨识性的可靠代理（附录 H.9）。

full.secZh: 6.4 线性可辨识性实现潜在空间规划

items.en: Thm. 5.4 predicts that any planner using a rotation-invariant cost attains identical performance in the learned and true latent. We test a natural instance: goal-reaching, where the straight line z^0→z^∗\hat{z}_{0}\to\hat{z}^{*} is the cost-minimizing trajectory. For an encoder satisfying h​(z)≈Q​zh(z)\approx Qz, this latent straight line decodes to a near-straight path in the true latent; without, the same plan induces a curved path (Fig. 17). Figs. 4c,d; 5 confirm both. The Gaussian encoder’s straight-latent plans decode to oracle-quality joint-space trajectories (left, middle), while the Trajectory encoder inflates control cost. Across all models, control cost tracks linear identifiability R2R^{2} monotonically (right). Thus, linear identifiability is the structural property that turns a faithful World Model into a useful planner.
items.zh: 定理 5.4 预测，任何使用旋转不变代价的规划器在学习到的潜变量和真实潜变量中都能获得相同的性能。我们测试一个自然实例：目标到达，其中直线 z^0→z^∗\hat{z}_{0}\to\hat{z}^{*} 是代价最小的轨迹。对于满足 h​(z)≈Q​zh(z)\approx Qz 的编码器，这条潜变量直线解码为真实潜变量中近乎笔直的路径；否则，同一规划会诱导出弯曲路径（图 17）。图 4c,d；图 5 均证实了这一点。高斯编码器的直线潜变量规划解码出与专家水平相当的关节空间轨迹（左、中），而轨迹编码器则增加了控制代价。在所有模型中，控制代价与线性可识别性 R2R^{2} 单调相关（右）。因此，线性可识别性是将忠实的世界模型转化为有用规划器的结构属性。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Linear Identifiability Enables Latent-Space Planning. Interpolation in each encoder’s latent space between fixed start and goal frames, decoded by nearest-neighbor retrieval (Fig. 17). top) Oracle (joint-space straight line) [86]. middle) Gaussian encoder (Sec. 3.1.1: OU, ρ=0.99\rho=0.99) tracks the oracle (overlaid) closely. bottom) RL trajectory [59] encoder (stride δ=8\delta=8) deviates.
items.capZh: 图 5：线性可识别性实现潜变量空间规划。在固定起始帧和目标帧之间，每个编码器的潜变量空间中进行插值，并通过最近邻检索解码（图 17）。上）专家（关节空间直线）[86]。中）高斯编码器（第 3.1.1 节：OU，ρ=0.99\rho=0.99）紧密跟踪专家（叠加显示）。下）RL 轨迹[59]编码器（步长δ=8\delta=8）出现偏差。

items.en: The Gaussian is the maximum-entropy distribution for a given mean and covariance [45], making it the least-assumption prior. Whether real-world latents are Gaussian is unknowable from observations alone, but the same applies to the non-Gaussianity assumptions of classical ICA [21] (maybe a structuralist perspective [47] is more agnostic). There is a scale-of-description argument in favor: individual micro-variables may be non-Gaussian, but task-relevant latent variables are often aggregates that tend toward Gaussianity by the central limit theorem.
items.zh: 高斯分布是给定均值和协方差下的最大熵分布[45]，使其成为假设最少的先验。真实世界的潜变量是否服从高斯分布无法仅从观测中得知，但经典 ICA 的非高斯性假设也是如此[21]（或许结构主义视角[47]更为不可知）。存在一个描述尺度的论据支持：单个微观变量可能是非高斯的，但任务相关的潜变量通常是聚合变量，根据中心极限定理趋向于高斯性。

items.en: Our theorem assumes the encoder output dimension matches the true latent dimension (m=nm=n). When m<nm<n, the Gaussianity constraint does not determine which subspace is selected or whether the system resorts to superposition [80, 27, 50]; when m>nm>n, extra dimensions must collapse or encode redundancy. Understanding this interaction is an important open problem with direct consequences for JEPA design [50].
items.zh: 我们的定理假设编码器输出维度与真实潜变量维度匹配（m=nm=n）。当 m<nm<n 时，高斯性约束并不决定选择哪个子空间或系统是否诉诸叠加[80, 27, 50]；当 m>nm>n 时，额外维度必须坍缩或编码冗余。理解这种相互作用是一个重要的开放问题，对 JEPA 设计有直接影响[50]。

items.en: Our result is a population-level statement about the global optimum. Thm. 5.3 shows the guarantee degrades continuously with respect to alignment gap and covariance deviation, but does not address how these scale with sample size [58] or training dynamics [78]. The few bound violations we observe empirically (Fig. 4a) are consistent with finite-sample estimation noise in ε\varepsilon and δ\delta.
items.zh: 我们的结果是关于全局最优的总体层面陈述。定理 5.3 表明，保证程度随对齐差距和协方差偏差连续退化，但未涉及这些如何随样本量[58]或训练动态[78]缩放。我们在经验中观察到的少数边界违反（图 4a）与 ε\varepsilon 和 δ\delta 的有限样本估计噪声一致。

items.en: Linear identifiability addresses the state side of a World Model; the action-conditioned transition p^​(z^′∣z^,a)\hat{p}(\hat{z}^{\prime}\mid\hat{z},a) must still be learned. Lifting identifiability to that setting connects naturally to interventional causal representation learning, where actions act as interventions on the latent variables [1, 16], and onward to causal graphs [62]. Our assumptions may not hold exactly in practice, but Thm. 5.3 shows the guarantee degrades gracefully.
items.zh: 线性可识别性解决了世界模型的状态方面；动作条件转移 p^​(z^′∣z^,a)\hat{p}(\hat{z}^{\prime}\mid\hat{z},a) 仍需学习。将该可识别性提升到该设置自然连接到干预性因果表示学习，其中动作作为对潜变量的干预[1, 16]，并进一步连接到因果图[62]。我们的假设在实践中可能不完全成立，但定理 5.3 表明保证程度会优雅地退化。

items.en: Two implications, one for data and one for objective. Data: the Reacher result shows that the same physical system supports identifiability when sampled isotropically (OU) but not under a goal-directed policy, whose marginals collapse onto a low-entropy region of latent space (Tab. 2); for self-supervised pretraining, exploration approximating an isotropic random walk keeps the data in the regime our theory covers. Objective: SIGReg, VICReg, and InfoNCE all yield linear identifiability when their assumptions hold, and our experiments suggest they fail in different ways: pair-based estimators are sensitive to kernel choice at scale (Tab. 1), moment-based estimators to non-Gaussian latents (App. H.7). Which estimator is preferable in practice, and how the choice interacts with batch size, architecture, and data regime, is left to future work.
items.zh: 两个启示，一个关于数据，一个关于目标。数据：Reacher 结果表明，同一物理系统在各向同性采样（OU）下支持可识别性，但在目标导向策略下则不然，其边缘分布坍缩到潜变量空间的低熵区域（表 2）；对于自监督预训练，近似各向同性随机游走的探索使数据保持在我们理论覆盖的范围内。目标：SIGReg、VICReg 和 InfoNCE 在其假设成立时都能产生线性可识别性，我们的实验表明它们以不同方式失败：基于对的估计器对大规模下的核选择敏感（表 1），基于矩的估计器对非高斯潜变量敏感（附录 H.7）。实践中哪种估计器更可取，以及选择如何与批量大小、架构和数据范围相互作用，留待未来工作。

items.en: Our theory inverts the classical ICA narrative: in linear ICA the Gaussian is the one distribution where source separation fails [21]; in our nonlinear setting it is exactly what enables it. The payoff is structural: linear identifiability turns a learned representation into a usable state for a control system, so any orthogonally-invariant cost transfers from the true world to the learned latent without modification, and simple planning (Thm. 5.4) and linear probing come for free. This is what it means to provably learn a World Model.
items.zh: 我们的理论颠倒了经典 ICA 的叙事：在线性 ICA 中，高斯分布是源分离失败的唯一分布[21]；在我们的非线性设置中，它恰恰是使其成为可能的分布。回报是结构性的：线性可识别性将学习到的表示转化为控制系统可用的状态，因此任何正交不变代价都能从真实世界转移到学习到的潜变量而无需修改，并且简单规划（定理 5.4）和线性探针自然实现。这就是可证明地学习世界模型的意义。
